name: hunt-game
description: MimicHunt — a browser-based multiplayer prop-hunt game (authoritative server).

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && run-p -l dev:shared dev:server dev:client
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @mimic/client && npm run build --workspace @mimic/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
